L=a(E)local A=function(...)return p(J,{...},E,L)end return A end,{},{},function(J,E)local L=a(E)local A=function()return p(J,{},E,L)end return A end return(t(14247233-(-980223),{}))(L(k))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[E(351270-365554)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
